title: Phase 4 code review and optimization audit
description:
Review all Phase 4 changes for correctness, safety, and performance:

1. **FFI Safety**: All `unsafe` blocks in decoder_layer.rs, quantized_linear.rs are correct — pointer arithmetic, buffer sizes, alignment
2. **KV-cache correctness**: forward_one() and forward_prefill() produce mathematically equivalent results to forward()
3. **Metal shader correctness**: Thread safety, bounds checking, shared memory races
4. **No regressions**: All Phase 3 functionality preserved
5. **Memory safety**: No leaks in KV-cache, Metal buffer pool, aligned weight buffers
6. **Performance**: Benchmarks actually measure what they claim (no measurement artifacts)
7. **Code quality**: No dead code, proper error handling, cfg(feature) gates correct

Provide structured feedback on any issues found with severity ratings (critical/major/minor).
